category_sources: source_facts.description describes libpcap as a portable library for network traffic capture.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and the official tcpdump/libpcap repository use libpcap as the project name.
docs_sources: tcpdump.org is source_facts.homepage and hosts the official libpcap manual pages.
repo_sources: The official tcpdump group GitHub repository identifies itself as the libpcap source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies network traffic capture; source_facts.homepage is the tcpdump/libpcap project site.
